description: Pinned corpus: the Swiss Federal Act on Medicinal Products and Medical Devices (Heilmittelgesetz, HMG / SR 812.21; French: Loi sur les produits thérapeutiques, LPTh), consolidated version in force 2025-01-01, fetched from the Fedlex filestore (official federal law portal). One law, multiple official language versions. The date pins the consolidation; if Fedlex publishes a newer consolidation the checksum changes and the corpus version is bumped deliberately.
law: SR 812.21 — Bundesgesetz über Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (Heilmittelgesetz, HMG)
